SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgateway.ads

Class ADSController

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.ads.ADSController
All Implemented Interfaces:
StatusCheckerService.ADSChecker
@RestController @CrossOrigin @RolesAllowed({"users","admin"}) @RequestMapping("/rest") @Lazy(false) public class ADSController extends Object implements StatusCheckerService.ADSChecker
Controller for Automated Data Submission to CDC
Author:
Audacious Inquiry

  • Method Details

    • getDestinationStatus

      @GetMapping("/ads/{destinationId}/status") public String getDestinationStatus(@RequestHeader(name="X-Message-ID",required=false) String xMessageId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Request-ID",required=false) String xRequestId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Correlation-ID",required=false) String xCorrelationId, @PathVariable String destinationId) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault
      Get the status of the destination.
      Parameters:
      xMessageId -
      xRequestId -
      xCorrelationId -
      destinationId -
      Returns:
      OK if the service is available, or throws an exception if it is not
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault - If a generic fault occurs
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.UnknownDestinationFault - If the destination is not known.
      MetadataFault - If there is an error in metadata
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.DestinationConnectionFault - If the destination could not be reached
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.HubClientFault - If the destination responded with some sort of error
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.MessageTooLargeFault - If the destination has reached its space limits

    • clearTokens

      @DeleteMapping("/ads/{destinationId}/clearTokens") @ResponseStatus(NO_CONTENT) public void clearTokens(@RequestHeader(name="X-Message-ID",required=false) String xMessageId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Request-ID",required=false) String xRequestId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Correlation-ID",required=false) String xCorrelationId, @PathVariable String destinationId) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault

      check in interface StatusCheckerService.ADSChecker
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault

    • getSubmissionStatus

      @GetMapping(value="/ads/{destinationId}/info/{tguid}", produces="application/json") public Object getSubmissionStatus(@RequestHeader(name="X-Message-ID",required=false) String xMessageId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Request-ID",required=false) String xRequestId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Correlation-ID",required=false) String xCorrelationId, @PathVariable String destinationId, @PathVariable String tguid) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault

    • getFile

      @GetMapping(value="/ads/{destinationId}", produces={"text/plain","text/csv","application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet","application/vnd.ms-excel","application/x-zip-compressed"}) public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<org.springframework.core.io.Resource> getFile(@PathVariable String destinationId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Message-ID",required=false) String xMessageId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Request-ID",required=false) String xRequestId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Correlation-ID",required=false) String xCorrelationId, @RequestParam String facilityId, @RequestParam String reportType, @RequestParam String period, @RequestParam String filename) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault

    • deleteFile

      @DeleteMapping("/ads/{destinationId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<String> deleteFile(@RequestHeader(name="X-Message-ID",required=false) String xMessageId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Request-ID",required=false) String xRequestId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Correlation-ID",required=false) String xCorrelationId, @PathVariable String destinationId, @RequestParam String facilityId, @RequestParam String reportType, @RequestParam String period, @RequestParam String filename, @RequestParam String reason) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault

    • getSubmissionForm

      @GetMapping(value="/submitFile", produces="text/html") public static String getSubmissionForm()

    • postADSFile

      @PostMapping(value="/ads/{destinationId}", consumes="multipart/form-data") public Metadata postADSFile(@PathVariable String destinationId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Message-ID",required=false) String xMessageId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Request-ID",required=false) String xRequestId, @RequestHeader(name="X-Correlation-ID",required=false) String xCorrelationId, @RequestParam("facilityId") String facilityId, @RequestParam("reportType") String reportType, @RequestParam("file") org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file, @RequestParam("period") String period, @RequestParam(required=false) String filename, @RequestParam(defaultValue="false") boolean force) throws gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault
      Throws:
      gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.fault.Fault
